summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DJ voting site with 3 real DJs. All features working perfectly including real SoundCloud-based bios, Instagram/SoundCloud links, PIX payment info, and WhatsApp functionality.

Instagram links work correctly without @ symbol in URLs
SoundCloud links work correctly for all 3 DJs
All 3 events show PIX 124.914.837-50 payment information
WhatsApp buttons work with correct phone number +5521972232170
Voting functionality works for all real DJs
Vote modal opens with all required form fields
Backend API tests: 18/18 passed (100% success rate)
CPF validation and duplicate vote prevention working
Vote statistics and ranking system working correctly
